briefing.opening: Good morning/afternoon. We will now begin today's climate briefing for March 15, 2026.

sections.title: 🔴 Deepening Climate Change Threats and Economic Impacts
sections.content: Climate change is now emerging as a core threat to the macroeconomy. It is impacting central banks [1], and heatwaves and droughts are striking global supply chains, exacerbating economic threats [4]. Specifically, an agricultural crisis due to extreme weather is anticipated in 2026 [3], and warnings are being issued that climate change directly affects personal finances [35]. Internationally, climate change is reshaping the geopolitical landscape of the Arctic [31], and causing extreme weather events in specific regions, such as droughts in Somalia and floods in Kenya [32]. Amidst these severe changes, LG Electronics is implementing a customized strategy for the Indian market, which experiences frequent power outages and significant climate change impacts [2].

sections.title: 🇰🇷 Domestic Policies and Expanded Citizen Participation for Carbon Neutrality Realization
sections.content: Domestically, policy and social efforts for transitioning to a carbon-neutral society are actively underway. Recently, six environmental bills passed the National Assembly, including those related to carbon neutrality and water management [9]. In particular, the 'Amendment to the Framework Act on Carbon Neutrality' passed the plenary session of the National Assembly, strengthening the institutional foundation [11]. Local governments are also actively participating; Cheongdo County declared a major transition to carbon neutrality and a green economy [10], and Chungcheongnam-do Province presented a carbon-neutral public building model at a wooden architecture expo [17]. Citizen participation is also expanding; Incheon City has designated the 15th of every month as 'Climate Action Day' to encourage citizen-led carbon neutrality practices [7, 14, 18, 19], and Cheongju City is recruiting participants for its vehicle carbon neutrality points system [13]. Furthermore, various local communities are continuing efforts for carbon neutrality, including carbon neutrality activities at Woongsang General Social Welfare Center [8], the inauguration ceremony for multicultural environmental leaders in Dalseo-gu [12], the 'Daedeok Environmental Guardians' campaign by Daedeok-gu Volunteer Center [15], and carbon neutrality education by Yeongwol-gun Volunteer Center [16].

sections.title: 🌱 Efforts to Expand Renewable Energy and Current Challenges
sections.content: The transition to renewable energy is a core pillar of climate change response, with various efforts being made both domestically and internationally. Domestically, Andong City is actively pursuing the creation of an 'energy welfare city' utilizing renewable energy [20], and Incheon's Namdong Industrial Complex is recruiting companies to participate in eco-friendly renewable energy projects [21]. Notably, concrete progress is being made in expanding renewable energy infrastructure, with seven offshore wind power cluster complexes in areas like Incheon and Jeollanam-do being conditionally designated [24, 25, 26, 27], and KEPCO KPS plans to establish an O&M base for offshore wind power generation in Jeollanam-do [28]. Internationally, there is also an analysis that China is achieving results without 'oil price shocks' through investments in electric vehicles and renewable energy [23]. However, challenges persist in the expansion of renewable energy. There are concerns that the intermittency issue of renewable energy cannot be resolved solely by expanding ESS (Energy Storage Systems) [22], and in Vietnam, international economic organizations from Korea, the UK, and Japan are urging payment for renewable energy power projects, highlighting issues that require international cooperation and resolution [29].

sections.title: 🌍 Climate Change Adaptation, Scientific Research, and Trends in Awareness Dissemination
sections.content: Alongside adaptation efforts to climate change, scientific research and activities to raise public awareness are steadily continuing. Domestically, Lotte Mart launched three types of domestic tropical and subtropical fruits, showcasing a product strategy adapted to the changing environment in response to climate change [6]. In the scientific field, research is underway to track the spring migration of 160 butterflies by attaching miniature transmitters to them, aiming to uncover the secrets of their survival amidst climate change [5]. Meanwhile, news has also been reported that scientists injected 65,000 liters of chemicals into the ocean to combat global warming [37]. Regarding public awareness, nearly one-third of this year's Oscar-nominated films mention climate change, indicating an expansion of message delivery through cultural content [33], and in Kalamazoo, a concert was held to support local climate change activities [34], demonstrating various ways to encourage interest and participation in climate change [36].

briefing.closing: This concludes today's climate briefing for March 15, 2026. Despite the threats of climate change, we hope for continued policy efforts, citizen participation, and scientific advancements.

summary.phenomenon: The 'Adaptive Cruise Control' feature of the New Defender 110 exemplifies the progress towards fully autonomous driving, where vehicles operate independently. At 'InterBattery 2026,' Korea's largest battery industry exhibition held on the 12th in COEX, Gangnam-gu, Seoul, Jung Won-seok, a senior research fellow at iM Securities, cautiously predicted the advent of this technology around 2029.
